name: L5 — Voidking Morr Cascade
flavor: Bury one, hear two whispers; bury two, the army hears.
description: Mono-VOID / mono-REVENANT graveyard-cycle shell centered on voidking_morr. The L5 mutation makes every ON_ALLY_DEATH trigger fire TWICE in immediate sequence (charter §22.2 L5, capped by the engine's _ALLY_DEATH_CAP=8), so each ally death generates double the buff/debuff/silence value. The supporting REVENANT pieces are picked exclusively for ON_ALLY_DEATH triggers: shadebishop and voidking_morr itself BUFF_ATK on death; dirge_lich DEBUFF_DEFs the enemy team; crypt_wraith APPLY_SILENCEs an enemy on death; ghoul_imp pre-poisons targets so they die during ally-death cascades. The intended dynamic: opponent kills a small ally early, the team-wide on-death wave hits twice, the ATK swing-up snowballs the rest of the match.
